## PR Readiness Checklist

- [ ] I ran `python -m skillsmith ready` locally (or in CI) and it passed.
- [ ] I generated readiness artifacts:
  - `python -m skillsmith report --artifact-dir .agent/reports/readiness`
- [ ] I reviewed `readiness_pr.md` and addressed blockers/warnings as needed.
- [ ] I verified tests for touched areas.
